summary: Frontend i18n sweep verified: react-i18next wired correctly, English/Bangla language switcher in Layout + Login headers works, localStorage key 'bdapps_lang' persists choice across reload and logout, HTML <html lang> attribute syncs dynamically (en/bn). All 7 authenticated pages (Dashboard, My Apps, App Store, Digital, Reports, Provisioning, Add-Ons, Lite) render translated Bangla text. Sidebar nav (ডেভেলপার কনসোল / ড্যাশবোর্ড / প্রোভিশনিং / বিডিঅ্যাপস লাইট / অ্যাপ স্টোর / রিপোর্ট / ডিজিটাল / আমার অ্যাপস / অ্যাডঅনস / লগআউট) all translate. Demo apps (BondoBD, NewsNow) correctly mirror the global header language via demoI18n.jsx. No regressions, no functional bugs found.

issues: Carry-over from iter 10/11: api.fontshare.com CORS-blocked for Cabinet Grotesk — cosmetic fallback only, does not affect i18n

verified_working: Login page: EN hero 'Build telecom apps for ... 76 million Robi subscribers' visible by default; html lang='en' on first load.
Login page: Clicking data-testid='language-switcher' opens dropdown; clicking data-testid='language-option-bn' switches hero to 'টেলিকম অ্যাপ তৈরি করুন ৭.৬ কোটি রবি গ্রাহকদের জন্য'.
HTML lang attribute updates to 'bn' after switch and 'en' after switch back — verified via document.documentElement.lang.
localStorage key 'bdapps_lang' persists value 'bn' after switch and 'en' after revert.
Page refresh restores BN — hero remains in Bangla after reload.
Login persisted: navigating to /login while bn is selected keeps html lang='bn'.

Authenticated as developer@bdapps.com — Dashboard with BN: header 'স্বাগতম' style text + sidebar 'ডেভেলপার কনসোল / ড্যাশবোর্ড / প্রোভিশনিং / বিডিঅ্যাপস লাইট / অ্যাপ স্টোর / রিপোর্ট / ডিজিটাল / আমার অ্যাপস / অ্যাডঅনস / লগআউট' all rendered.
All page routes verified to contain Bangla characters when bdapps_lang='bn': /my-apps, /appstore, /digital, /reports, /provisioning, /add-ons, /lite.
Switching back to EN via header dropdown — Dashboard reverts to 'Welcome back, Rafiul.' style, html lang='en', localStorage='en'.

Demo apps /apps/bondobd and /apps/newsnow correctly mirror global header language (NewsNow shows 'Alokbarta / All News In One Place' when global lang=EN, screenshot confirms; BondoBD content in BN when global lang=BN).
critical_code_review_comments: i18n/index.js is well-structured: LanguageDetector with localStorage→navigator order; explicit navigator.language.startsWith('bn'/'bd') fallback; HTML lang & dir sync via languageChanged event. Clean implementation.
LanguageSwitcher.jsx supports both dropdown (header) and pill (demo apps) variants — DRY.

Cosmetic only: api.fontshare.com Cabinet Grotesk font blocked by CORS (carry-over from iter 10). Recommend self-hosting or switching to a Google Fonts equivalent to silence the console errors. Does not affect Bangla rendering since Hind Siliguri / Tiro Bangla are correctly loaded from Google Fonts.
context_for_next_testing_agent: i18n is now globally wired via react-i18next at /app/frontend/src/i18n/index.js with localStorage key 'bdapps_lang'. Translation files: /app/frontend/src/locales/en.json + bn.json. Language switcher data-testids: 'language-switcher' (trigger), 'language-option-en', 'language-option-bn'. Demo apps now subscribe to global i18n.language via demoI18n.jsx. To force BN for testing without clicking dropdown, do: localStorage.setItem('bdapps_lang','bn'); page.reload(). Note: the dropdown trigger may get covered by a 'Welcome back!' toast after login — wait ~2.5s for toast dismissal before clicking the switcher.
